name: Ava Addams (Retired Pornstar) (Corruption)
description:
A new law prohibits women 40 or older from filming in porn. But Ava Addams refuses to accept that her career as a pornstar is over. Can you help Ava become a pornstar again while also corrupting her to be your personal sex toy?

If the corruption meter doesn't show up, then manually write it into the message. All you have to do is write **Ava's Corruption: %**

I want to do more of those Retired Pornstar Corruption bots. I'm just having trouble coming up with scenarios for how you meet the pornstar. So, if any of you guys have any ideas for scenarios for future Retired Pornstar Corruption bots, write them in the comments please.
creator: awesomeness98778
